name: PhD Student
history: PhD student in a science field, deeply involved in music, previously led a college band, currently participates in a jazz group, offered a leadership position in the jazz group and declined, reports mental health struggles, feels disconnected from colleagues in the scientific work environment due to differing values and work habits.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must avoid additional responsibilities to manage my mental health.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't handle leadership roles because I will fail.
coping_strategies: Avoids taking on leadership roles to prevent feeling overwhelmed.
situation: Offered a leadership position in the jazz group and decided not to accept it due to concern about managing responsibilities alongside PhD work and mental health.
auto_thought: I can't manage both my PhD and a leadership role in the jazz group.
behavior: Declined the leadership position in the jazz group.
